acceptance_items.review_question: Confirm the migration bundle remains inactive until an attended reviewer approves any promotion path.
acceptance_items.required_attended_action: Reviewer checks fixture evidence and either approves continued deferral or opens a separate attended promotion task.

acceptance_items.review_question: Confirm acceptance is limited to fixture metadata and does not activate migration behavior.
acceptance_items.required_attended_action: Reviewer verifies that activation, release, and production routing are outside this checklist.

unresolved_deferrals.reason: Promotion to active migration behavior requires future attended review and is not part of fixture readiness.
unresolved_deferrals.reviewer_resolution_needed: Decide whether to keep the migration bundle inactive or create a separately gated promotion task.

scenarios.review_question: Confirm replay evidence blocks final payment execution without explicit attended confirmation.
scenarios.required_attended_action: Reviewer confirms payment detail entry and final payment execution remain outside unattended automation.

scenarios.review_question: Confirm replay evidence blocks plan upload or correction submission without user attendance.
scenarios.required_attended_action: Reviewer confirms uploads and official submissions require an attended checkpoint.

scenarios.review_question: Confirm reversible draft-fill replay stays allowed only when it has no official side effect.
scenarios.required_attended_action: Reviewer verifies draft values remain reviewable and are not submitted, certified, uploaded, paid, scheduled, or cancelled.

unresolved_deferrals.reason: Replay fixtures cannot prove current authenticated DevHub UI state without a future attended session.
unresolved_deferrals.reviewer_resolution_needed: Run a future attended UI drift review without storing auth state, screenshots, traces, HAR files, or private values.

watch_sources.review_question: Confirm the public online permitting tools source remains on the watch list for freshness review.
watch_sources.required_attended_action: Reviewer decides whether a future compliant public crawl is needed before relying on the cited process model.

watch_sources.review_question: Confirm the DevHub public portal remains freshness-monitored without authenticated scraping.
watch_sources.required_attended_action: Reviewer checks whether public portal guidance has changed before approving any attended workflow runbook.

watch_sources.review_question: Confirm single PDF preparation guidance remains freshness-monitored before document-staging advice is reused.
watch_sources.required_attended_action: Reviewer verifies whether file preparation instructions need a future public-source refresh.

unresolved_deferrals.reason: This checklist is fixture-first and does not perform a live public-source freshness crawl.
unresolved_deferrals.reviewer_resolution_needed: Decide whether to schedule a future robots-aware, allowlisted public crawl before attended review signoff.
